B_HardGate.name: B_HardGate
B_HardGate.description: Hard RF regime reject + hard XGB quality reject (v2.1)

C_SoftRegimeOnly.name: C_SoftRegimeOnly
C_SoftRegimeOnly.description: RF regime scales position 0.5x-1.0x (no reject), no XGB

D_SoftRegimeXGB.name: D_SoftRegimeXGB
D_SoftRegimeXGB.description: RF regime soft + XGB soft scaling (no rejections)

E_XGBOnlySoft.name: E_XGBOnlySoft
E_XGBOnlySoft.description: XGB win probability directly scales position (0.3x-1.2x)

F_LGBOnlySizing.name: F_LGBOnlySizing
F_LGBOnlySizing.description: No gates, LightGBM loss-predictor sizing only

G_EnsembleSoft.name: G_EnsembleSoft
G_EnsembleSoft.description: All layers as soft signals — combined weighted scaling

H_AdaptiveGate.name: H_AdaptiveGate
H_AdaptiveGate.description: Regime-adaptive: soft in moderate, hard reject only in extreme
